description: Configure the 'Sparkling Water Concept Test - Wave 3' survey for a consumer panel launch by updating the General, Presentation, and Publication settings. The survey must use a 'Question by Question' format with the progress bar enabled, the 'Previous' button disabled, and the 'No answer' option hidden. Set the Welcome message to: 'Welcome to the Sparkling Water Concept Evaluation. You will be shown a new beverage concept and asked to share your honest reactions. This survey takes approximately 7 minutes. Your individual responses are confidential and will be reported only in aggregate. Please read each concept description carefully before answering.' Set the End message to: 'Thank you for completing the concept evaluation. Your feedback directly influences our product development decisions. Your responses have been recorded and will remain strictly confidential.' The End URL must be 'https://panel.researchportal.com/complete?status=1&sid={SID}'. Configure basic admin notifications to be sent to 'concept-alerts@beverageco.com' and schedule the survey with a Start Date of February 1, 2025, and an Expiry Date of March 15, 2025.
